ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., country, region, world) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the entity's centroid */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the entity's centroid */,
  "area_km2" TEXT /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_boundary" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "boundary_geom" TEXT /* Boundary of the entity as a geometric shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "living_planet_index" (
  "lpi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LPI record */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being monitored */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the LPI value was recorded */,
  "lpi_value" REAL /* LPI value for the entity and year */,
  "lower_ci" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the LPI value */,
  "upper_ci" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the LPI value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lpi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_living_planet_index_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES lpi_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_living_planet_index_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_living_planet_index_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES lpi_publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lpi_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each LPI source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the LPI source (e.g., WWF) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the LPI source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the LPI source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lpi_publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the LPI source that published the LPI values */,
  "publication_title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the publication was released */,
  "publication_doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lpi_publications_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES lpi_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_contributors" (
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributor */,
  "contributor_name" TEXT /* Name of the contributor */,
  "contributor_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the contributor */,
  "contributor_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contributor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "contributor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contributor who submitted the data */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the data was submitted */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., accepted, rejected, pending) */,
  "submission_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_submissions_contributor_id FOREIGN KEY ("contributor_id") REFERENCES data_contributors ("contributor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout, data submission) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the access log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "news_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "news_content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "news_author" TEXT /* Author of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "parent_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent entity */,
  "child_entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child entity */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., country, region) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_parent_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_relationships_child_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
